    <script>
        /**
         * Global Cookie Utilities
         * Defined here to ensure availability to both classic and module scripts
         */
        function getCookie(name) {
            const value = `; ${document.cookie}`;
            const parts = value.split(`; ${name}=`);
            if (parts.length === 2) return parts.pop().split(";").shift();
            return null;
        }

        function setCookie(name, value, days = 365) {
            const expires = new Date();
            expires.setTime(expires.getTime() + days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
            document.cookie = `${name}=${value};expires=${expires.toUTCString()};path=/;SameSite=Lax`;
        }

        function switchAudience(audienceValue) {
            setCookie("audience", audienceValue.toString());
            location.reload();
        }
        
        window.getCookie = getCookie;
        window.setCookie = setCookie;
        window.switchAudience = switchAudience;
    </script>
